privileged_info_summary: Malka Hartmann (PID 12) is a 31-year-old female patient (DOB: 1994-11-26) in the NOSH ChartingSystem, with contact email malka.hartmann@example.com and phone 413-555-1012. The patient is part of a synthetic patient cohort generated by Synthea, an open-source synthetic patient data generator. The task involves multi-specialty care coordination with Dr. Emily Brooks (user ID 3), requiring documentation of an office visit encounter, two laboratory orders (TSH and CBC), two specialty referrals (Endocrinology and Cardiology), and internal messaging within the NOSH system.
